hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulators with a connected, evidence-driven platform that consolidates VASP data, supervisory alerts, cases, and reporting into a secure operational workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervisory workflows break when data disconnects
problem_description: Regulators struggle to maintain a clear operating view when VASP and CASP data remain isolated across multiple systems. This separation slows risk-based reviews and complicates the connection between market activity, evidence, and supervisory action.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY connects VASP and CASP data, licensing records, wallet and transaction activity, alerts, cases and evidence into a single platform that supports structured supervisory workflows and audit-ready reporting.
workflow_title: From market signals to supervisory actions
workflow_description: SFTY connects market signals through alerts, cases, investigations, and supervisory decisions to structured evidence and regulatory reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. A supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented market signals, entity data, cases and evidence into one secure supervisory layer for structured review, escalation and reporting workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY delivers a secure, auditable platform for regulatory teams requiring evidence-grade logging, controlled access and procurement-safe deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support supervisory workflows and case review
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how supervisory alerts become structured cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs preserve evidence for regulatory review
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects licensing data to market activity
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps regulators connect VASP and CASP data, licensing records, transactions, alerts, cases and reports into a secure supervisory layer for market-level digital asset oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support supervisory workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures alerts, cases, supervisory decisions, and escalations into organized workflows that guide regulatory review from risk signals to documented actions and reporting.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve supervisory evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence-grade records to support supervisory actions remain auditable and support defensible regulatory outcomes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider outputs?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY operates above multiple KYT, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and blockchain analytics providers, normalizing and linking their outputs into connected supervisory cases and reports.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing analytics tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace analytics tools but connects and orchestrates provider outputs within one controlled supervisory environment for resilient, multi-source oversight.
final_title: Structure supervisory workflows into one operational layer
final_description: Review how SFTY connects VASP data, alerts, cases and evidence into secure workflows for regulatory supervision.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
